reviews.comment:
Muy caro, no tienen maquina de agua caliente como tiene que haber el cualquier estación que se llame de servicios, en el full pedí si me vendían y no me quisieron vender ni dar teniendo la maquina de agua fría y caliente a 1/2 metro. Muy mal servicio.

(Translated by Google)
Very expensive. They don't have a hot water machine, as any so-called service station should have. I asked at the store if they would sell it to me, but they wouldn't sell it or give it to me, even though the hot and cold water machine is half a meter away. Very bad service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3d0tDTWRBEAE
